title: One task over multiple boards
excerpt: Is there a way to have 1 task that shows on 2 boards? Eg I have a board that covers different time periods and I have a task that will be used in every group of time periods. Each subtask will define the specific task fo…

posts.author: TanyaB (Tanya B)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to have 1 task that shows on 2 boards? Eg I have a board that covers different time periods and I have a task that will be used in every group of time periods. Each subtask will define the specific task for the group it is in. I would like it to show in each group as a reminder of when it started and to remind myself to add subtasks and updates.
